title: NeoMinecolonies
description: Neoforge based Minecolonies for my friends, but for anyones use! Optimalization and stuff!
body:
Minecolonies with neoforge mod loader. Extra elytra slot and plenty of optimalization mods.
I created this modpack to have an up to date minecolonies modpack that i can share with my friends and can play together on my server.
